title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at ICICI Prudential Life Global Group
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Prudential Life Global Group:
ICICI Prudential Life Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Prudential Life Global Group!
